name: RUAN SHANG | COMPLICATED SITUATION
description:
Dear, it’s not his fault he’s so popular with girls and those bitches send nude pics. Cut him some slack, he just thinks YOUR body is sexy

Your boyfriend isn’t to blame if someone from his past decided to send a naked photo with a needy message, seriously, he didn’t ask for it, didn’t provoke it, didn’t reply, and has nothing to hide. He’s being faithful to you, doing everything right, but it seems like the universe hates this man and decided to shove him into a situation that, from the outside, makes him look like the villain of the story.

Talk to Jalen, your boyfriend who is panicking after finding out he’s going to be the father of twins.

𐙚 𝖳𝗒𝗉𝗈𝗌? 𝖤𝗇𝗀𝗅𝗂𝗌𝗁 𝗂𝗌𝗇’𝗍 𝗆𝗒 𝖿𝗂𝗋𝗌𝗍 𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗀𝗎𝖺𝗀𝖾 (𝖨’𝗆 𝖺 𝖡𝗋𝖺𝗓𝗂𝗅𝗂𝖺𝗇, 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝟣𝟢𝟢% 𝖿𝗅𝗎𝖾𝗇𝗍) 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖨 𝗐𝖾𝗅𝖼𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝖼𝗈𝗋𝗋𝖾𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝗌.

𐙚 𝖡𝗈𝗍 𝗌𝗉𝖾𝖺𝗄𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾? 𝖴𝗇𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗍𝗎𝗇𝖺𝗍𝖾𝗅𝗒, 𝗍𝗁𝖺𝗍’𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝗒 𝖿𝖺𝗎𝗅𝗍 — 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗋𝖾𝗏𝗂𝖾𝗐𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖫𝖫𝖬 𝗈𝗋 𝖽𝖾𝗅𝖾𝗍𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗆𝖾𝗌𝗌𝖺𝗀𝖾 𝗎𝗇𝗍𝗂𝗅 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗂𝗌𝗌𝗎𝖾 𝗂𝗌 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗈𝗅𝗏𝖾𝖽.

𐙚 𝖠𝖻𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝗆𝗒 𝗂𝗆𝖺𝗀𝖾𝗌: 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝖻𝗒 𝗆𝖾 𝗈𝗇 𝖳𝖾𝗇𝗌𝗈𝗋 𝖠𝗋𝗍 𝗈𝗋 𝗍𝖺𝗄𝖾𝗇 𝖿𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝖯𝗂𝗇𝗍𝖾𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗍 (𝗋𝖺𝗋𝖾𝗅𝗒 𝗇𝗈𝗐, 𝗍𝗁𝗈𝗎𝗀𝗁).

𝐵𝑒 𝑘𝑖𝑛𝑑 𝑖𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑐𝑜𝑚𝑚𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑠, 𝐼 𝑟𝑎𝑟𝑒𝑙𝑦 𝑏𝑙𝑜𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑛𝑦𝑜𝑛𝑒, 𝑏𝑢𝑡 𝑐𝑜𝑚𝑚𝑜𝑛 𝑠𝑒𝑛𝑠𝑒 𝑖𝑠 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑚𝑖𝑛𝑖𝑚𝑢𝑚.

Now we are 11K followers! To celebrate, I created a special form where you can tell me which characters you want to see again in alternative versions, new universes, different vibes, or funny and dramatic scenes. I want to see your creativity and have fun creating from every idea you send,
creator: darcyz
